summary: CR-MENU-0001: Pre-Export Correction Diff View — all 7 test cases passed. Export modal for Akula Organics shows CORRECTIONS TO REVIEW section with 3 items (EDITED, DELETED, UNCLEAR). Ghatkesar shows all-approved green state. Export button regression working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CR-MENU-0001 fully verified. ExportModal receives pages and corrections props, buildDiffItems() correctly filters non-approve corrections. data-testids: export-corrections-diff, export-diff-item-{page}-{rowNo}, export-diff-unclear-warning, export-diff-all-approved, export-confirm-btn all working. Akula Organics (0013) shows 3 diff items (P1·R2 EDITED Idli→Plain Dosa, P3·R2 DELETED Stuffed Mirchi Bajji, P3·R3 UNCLEAR Brinjal Bajji with POS warning). Ghatkesar (0007) shows all-approved green state with no diff list.

test_results.T1: PASS — Export modal opens with CORRECTIONS TO REVIEW section showing count=3
test_results.T2: PASS — EDITED row P1·R2 shows 'Idli (1 pc)' strikethrough → 'Plain Dosa' with blue EDITED badge
test_results.T3: PASS — DELETED row P3·R2 shows 'Stuffed Mirchi Bajji (4 pcs)' in strikethrough with red DELETED badge
test_results.T4: PASS — UNCLEAR row P3·R3 shows amber UNCLEAR badge + POS warning 'Will be exported with original AI values — verify before POS push'
test_results.T5: PASS — Ghatkesar shows green all-approved state 'All reviewed rows were approved — nothing to inspect', no diff list
test_results.T6: PASS — Export button proceeds to done state with 'Download started' message, no errors
test_results.T7: PASS — Review Summary shows all labels: Reviewed, Approved, Edited, Deleted, Unclear, Remaining, Notes reviewed
